description: Multi-file refactor — tests step logging and state tracking across many edits
task: Create a Python module at /tmp/relentless-test-refactor/. Step 1: Create /tmp/relentless-test-refactor/calculator.py with a Calculator class that has add, subtract, multiply, divide methods (divide should handle zero division). Step 2: Create /tmp/relentless-test-refactor/test_calculator.py with pytest tests for all 4 operations plus a zero-division test. Step 3: Run the tests with 'uv run pytest /tmp/relentless-test-refactor/test_calculator.py -v --no-header' and capture the output. Step 4: Create /tmp/relentless-test-refactor/RESULTS.md summarizing what was built and the test results. Log each step in the state file as you complete it.

description: Read + analyze + write — tests discovery logging and multi-phase work
task: Analyze the Python files in /tmp/relentless-test-refactor/ (created by a prior task — if missing, note that as a discovery and create a minimal calculator.py first). Step 1: Read each .py file and count lines of code, number of functions/methods, and number of classes. Step 2: Check for any potential issues (missing docstrings, bare except clauses, unused imports). Step 3: Write a report to /tmp/relentless-test-report.md with a table of file stats and a list of findings. Record any unexpected discoveries (e.g., files missing, syntax errors found). Mark complete when the report is written.

description: Fix-and-verify loop — tests state tracking through retry cycles
